title: Claude Code Leak: What's Happening?
summary: A YouTube video analyzing a leaked Claude Code source repository (exposed via committed NPM .map files) that explores its architecture as a TypeScript harness over an LLM, examines its 3-layer memory system, discusses copyright implications for AI-generated code, and explores telemetry and token economics. The presenter advocates for building independent AI solutions rather than depending on proprietary platforms.
